problem id: b8e38a49
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHL(4)) XOR ROT(4)

examples:
  01101010 -> 00000110
  00001101 -> 11000000
  10010011 -> 00111001
  10101101 -> 01001010
  00100100 -> 01000010
  00010010 -> 00100001
  10111001 -> 00011011
  01101111 -> 01000110
  11111001 -> 00011111
  10011110 -> 10001001

query: 11011011
predicted answer: 10011101
